evidence.summary: Fixture entrypoint intentionally omits frontmatter description.

skipped_checks.reason: This fixture isolates only missing frontmatter description.
skipped_checks.impact: Other static defects are covered by sibling bad_static fixtures.

residual_risk: The fixture must be refreshed if frontmatter validation rules change.
claim_boundary: This contract covers only the missing-description bad static fixture. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
